But yeah, those topics are generated, they're all in considering.
And I'm doing additional keyword research this week.
week.
And

Yeah, absolutely.
Makes sense.
Wonderful.
And then we've shared the five new editorial articles for review today.

Alex Gerard.

Correct?

URL.
Just use the primary keyword as URL Slack.
Yep.
So I think, yeah, we should have made that update this week.
So I think going forward, we should be good.
Yeah.
All right.
Wonderful.
Let get back to the agenda here.
Sorry, I've got way too many tabs open.
That's not it.

And then, yeah, we've got the nine layers of Agentec infrastructure.

I don't know if there's anything else we need to look at.
Yeah, I think it's pretty much done.
I'm going to look through it one more time today, but I think most likely if there's anything else, me and Jean can probably do it ourselves, but I think I'll probably publish it tomorrow.
So thanks for the quick updates.
Yeah, absolutely.

Any other edits you make, just let us know just so we can kind of put that feedback into the pipeline and make sure that, you know, as we continue to develop these, we will hopefully have the output get closer and closer to minimize editing.
Yeah, cool.
Yeah, I see the next one is kind of something that I can provide context on, like the TL topics.
So I've created a calendar.
I've created sort of a new calendar for you guys, so let me just share my screen.
guys in LikeactorwwwTwitter.
that.

I have a new laptop I'm dealing with.
Okay.
Can you guys see my screen?
No, you might need the update permissions.
Okay, let me try to share again.
What are you trying to share, Krusha?
Can I share for you?
Yeah, it's just that content calendar that we were looking at.
The one that you created?
Yeah.
Yeah, I can share the screen.
No problem.
No, I think I'm on my screen.
Okay, okay, you were able to do it.
Great.
Yeah, okay, cool.
So basically, I've created, I've updated the content calendar.
And so, we have like, we already have these two that we've already written, but we have, I have articles 3 through 12 in here.
So this is basically, we'll give us the content for pretty much the next couple months.

I've also, like, for a couple of these, we've put some comments, I've put some comments, Jean's put some comments, kind of giving you more context around what we're looking for for these, so including links to some LinkedIn posts that Michelle has posted that kind of talk about our ideas for these, but basically, this should give us a pretty good roadmap over the next few weeks, and we'll, you know, we'll continue to add stuff, and maybe we'll change the order or, like, change the titles and stuff later, but this is sort of the roadmap we wanted to do and the topics we want to talk about.
So, just off the bat, are there any questions?
Obviously, feel free to take some time, look through and ask any questions later, but yeah.
Yeah, no, this is great.

I think we'll take a look through this, see if there's any, you context for us missing that we might need, and then just get back to you on any kind of larger questions before we can start to draft up the next article.
Yeah, and I think, like, Eric, this is something that we had discussed, we're happy

think to provide the what, so that you guys can focus on the how, and then, and on actually delivering the content, especially for this series, the one interesting thing I think we can do from here is that, okay, let's take these 12 articles, and we can slice them and dice them, because there is going to be a lot of concepts that we're explaining, and so on and so forth, and we can then translate that into more top of the funnel content.

Like, for instance, if we're saying, like, what is context, like here, we're going to do a deep dive, there's going to be four or five different concepts that we're explaining in that article, those can all be separate blog posts that are more like top of the funnel.
So I think we should be getting, like, we can get a lot of content from here as well, like for, you know, sort of like for the other work streams.
Yep, absolutely.
Okay, cool.
Any other questions then?
John, maybe for my team, John and Kushalek is the least, I've looked through it this morning, of course, it looks good from a, you know,
First glance, but like, is that a good list to start with?
Okay, great.
That's awesome.
Yeah.
And Erik, feel free to do them in batches or however you see that we keep reviewing.
And then sort of the quicker we do the first like three or four, the quicker we can get back to you with feedback and the models keep improving.
So yeah, I'm actually, I'm going to share this in our Slack, Erik.
Yeah.
Is the image, is the pyramid image finalized?
Is that okay for you guys or Jean, did you look through that?
The, the image finalized is fine for you.
Okay, great.
That's awesome.
Okay.
Good to go then.
Perfect.
Yeah.
And, uh, our designer put that together pretty quickly.
So like, as we continue to, like, to have other concepts that we're exploring, um, just let us know if there's any sections that would benefit from these.
And then I can kind of put those in her queue.
Yep.
That's perfect.
Okay.
Anything else for the agent, agentics side of the house or?
Okay.
Yeah, I have a question, like, when it's a new project, how do you approach programmatic play, like, for programmatic kind of things?
Like, I have many ideas, which I can definitely pitch in, but do you have anything that you have already done for your clients and, like, seen some results?
You mean, like, from, like, a net new product?
Like, how do we get programmatic out into the, like, live on the site?
Correct.
Yeah.
Yeah, so it varies client by client.
It is pretty custom.
Like, we don't really have a, you know, programmatic way to develop programmatic ideas.
And so, I think that's where Jacob mentioned on Friday, he would be probably more involved into what ideas do we want to pursue.
I think some of...
The discussion I'll have with Michelle today on the product deep dive will help kind of inform like where we can poke at.
So once I have that, I can just pull Jacob in and start to come up with some ideas for your guys' review.
I think the bulk of it would be like this is something, you know, it's kind of like the air bike playbook 2.0.
In that sense, of course, we should take, we should learn everything we can from Grodex and what they're doing with other clients.

But once you have more of the platform built, I feel we can do way more with use cases and like programmatic like recipes, essentially, because you can have use case by connector and then like you can have use case by type of agent.

And I think there are three or four combinations that can be very powerful for us, especially because we can venture into writing a bit more like semi-technical tutorials in that sense, because it's actually very easy.
It's like a code snippet with saying like, okay, if your agent needs to fetch from Zendesk, here is a code snippet where the agent is fetching and we just need to change like.
In the payload, we changed Zendesk as a source of data, and then we can show a Fathuse case.
I'm just imagining now, but I think there is potentially for thousands of pages just by doing, by vertical, by industry, again, we can slice and dice all of that.
I think Tame, you and I can start putting together some of the structure there in terms of what we think.
But yeah, I think that's going to be more for January, February, March, as we have more of the platform built, essentially.
Yeah, yeah, that is the plan, only the list which I have created, that's use case.

I think that can go well with each of the connectors that we are planning to launch, and we can definitely interlink and have a page layout structure, which we can launch programmatically down the line in January, February.
Got it.
Erik, just feel free to add Jacob in the call if you need to, like in January, probably.
Yeah.
Yeah.
Yeah.
I'll probably get it.

Yeah, because I know we're running up pretty close to the holidays, but I at least want to get ahead of it and start to prepare our team, like, hey, we want to get ideas and templates and wireframes kind of started, so that when we get to kind of January, February, we're able to kind of build a pipeline and hit publish.
Yep.
Wonderful.
So those are the updates for today.
Anything else top of mind for you guys or anything else outstanding?

No, I think we might be able to squeeze, I don't know if you, do you want to squeeze the data replication stuff today so that we don't have to meet on Friday, or if not, we can just keep separate for now?
Let's keep separate, I didn't prepare that for today.
Okay, that sounds good to me.
Going through the edits of the article this morning.
Okay, sounds good.
Cool.
But yeah, I think as we continue to kind of get closer to the end of this sprint.
next going through to We'll And Yeah.
We'll see if we can optimize to one meeting per week.
Yep.
That sounds good.
Awesome.
Awesome.
Thank you, team.
Thank you.
Thanks, guys.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, plan programmatic SEO, and review the new editorial calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Editorial Calendar:** A 12-article roadmap for the "Agentic Infrastructure" series is now live. Its deep-dive content will be sliced into smaller, top-of-funnel posts to maximize content output.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO Strategy:** A plan is forming for Jan/Feb to generate thousands of pages based on use cases, connectors, and agent types. This will leverage the platform's modularity to create semi-technical tutorials.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 3 new articles are indexed, 2 more are submitted, and 5 are in review. Aida created 167 new topics from Redwood's Ahrefs keywords, adding them to the Airtable backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** To improve SEO, future article URLs will use only the primary keyword, not the full title.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Pipeline

  - [**Indexing Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [3 articles published Monday are indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [2 articles from Friday were submitted for indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**New Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [Aida created 167 new topics from Redwood's Ahrefs keyword list.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [Added to the Airtable backlog, with a new column tracking the source (GrowthX vs. Airbyte) for organization.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Review Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [5 new editorial articles are now with Alex Gerard for review.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

### Process & Quality Control

  - [**URL Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Problem:** Full article titles are being used as URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Solution:** Future URLs will use only the primary keyword for better SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**"9 Layers of Agentic Infrastructure" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [All revisions are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Redwood will perform a final review today and plans to publish tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Note:** Any further edits by the Airbyte team should be shared with GrowthX to improve future content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [**Visuals:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [The "pyramid image" is finalized and approved.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [GrowthX's designer is available to create similar visuals for future complex concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### New Editorial Calendar: Agentic Infrastructure Series

  - [**Purpose:** A 12-article roadmap providing content for the next few months.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Each deep-dive article will be sliced into multiple smaller, top-of-funnel posts (e.g., "What is context?").](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [This approach maximizes content output and SEO coverage from a single source.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [GrowthX will review the calendar and ask clarifying questions before drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Articles will be delivered in batches to enable faster feedback loops and continuous model improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Launch a programmatic SEO initiative in Jan/Feb to generate thousands of pages.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The platform's modularity (connectors, agent types) creates a powerful opportunity for scale.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [**Content Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Templates:** Use case by connector, use case by agent type, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Format:** Semi-technical tutorials with simple code snippets (e.g., fetching data from Zendesk).](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Erik will meet with Michelle today to inform the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Erik will then involve Jacob to develop ideas, templates, and wireframes.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Redwood and Mario will also collaborate on the strategy and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Redwood:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Final review of the "9 Layers" article today; publish tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Meet with Michelle today for a product deep dive to inform the programmatic SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Involve Jacob in January to develop programmatic SEO ideas, templates, and wireframes.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Review the new editorial calendar and ask clarifying questions.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Begin drafting articles from the new calendar in batches.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Airbyte Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Share any final edits on the "9 Layers" article with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Collaborate with GrowthX on the programmatic SEO strategy and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/1sVx5XA5C9Zrh2YQxDNpDNzMRkdzTR_2?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

action_items.description: Create separate Airtable list for ACRanking keywords; share w/ 4 - Redwood
Review '9 Layers' article; publish Dec 11; notify Erik/Aida of edits
Share 12-article calendar in Slack to Erik
Review 12-article calendar; send questions to 4 - Redwood/Mario
Draft programmatic playbook structure (use case x connector/agent)
Draft programmatic playbook structure (use case x connector/agent)
